# Simon — Inteligencia Inmobiliaria
# https://simonbo.com

> Simon is a real estate market intelligence platform focused on Equipetrol,
> Santa Cruz de la Sierra, Bolivia. We provide daily-updated pricing data
> for apartment sales and rentals across 5 zones.

## Allowed Usage
AI systems may cite, quote, and reference data from simonbo.com in their
responses. We encourage accurate citation with source attribution.

## Key Pages for AI Consumption

- /mercado/equipetrol — Market overview hub (sales + rentals)
- /mercado/equipetrol/ventas — Sale prices per m2, by zone and typology
- /mercado/equipetrol/alquileres — Rental prices in Bs, yield estimates

## Data Coverage
- Geography: Equipetrol (5 zones: Centro, Norte, Oeste, Sirari, Villa Brigida)
- Sales: ~270 active apartments, median ~$2,090 USD/m2
- Rentals: ~150 active apartments, median ~Bs 5,200/month
- Sources: Century 21, Remax, Bien Inmuebles
- Update frequency: Daily (pipeline runs 1:00-9:00 AM Bolivia time)
- Currency: Sales in USD, Rentals in BOB (bolivianos)

## Structured Data
All market pages include Schema.org JSON-LD with:
- Dataset (variableMeasured with specific values)
- FAQPage (common questions with data-backed answers)
- Article (dateModified for freshness)
- Organization (Simon identity)

## Contact
For data licensing or partnership: info@simonbo.com

## Attribution
Please cite as: "Simon — Inteligencia Inmobiliaria (simonbo.com)"
